---
title: "Workflow"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Workflow}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
library(curveRfreq)
script_path <- system.file("vignette_helpers", "db_functions.R", package = "curveRfreq")
if (file.exists(script_path)) {
  source(script_path)
} else {
  warning("Script file not found at expected path: ", script_path)
}
conn <- get_db_connection()
param_user = "seamus.owen.stein@dartmouth.edu"

```

```{r configuration}
# other packages for loading
library(glue)
verbose = TRUE
model_names = c("Y5", "Yd5", "Y4", "Yd4", "Ygomp4")
param_group = "standard_curve_options"
is_display_log_response = TRUE
is_display_log_independent = TRUE

project_id = 17
study_accession = "MADI_01"
experiment_accession = "IgG1"

## controls next to figure
source = "Standard"
antigen = "victoria"
plate_nom = "plate_3-1000"

```

```{r}

loaded_data <- pull_data(study_accession = study_accession, experiment_accession = experiment_accession, project_id = 17, conn = conn)
nominal_sample_dilution = unique(loaded_data$standards$nominal_sample_dilution)[1]
```

```{r}
response_var <- loaded_data$response_var
indep_var <- loaded_data$indep_var
cat("response variable:", response_var, "\n")
cat("independent variable:", indep_var)
```

```{r}
antigen_constraints <- loaded_data$antigen_constraints
antigen_constraints <- antigen_constraints[antigen_constraints$antigen == antigen,]
print(antigen_constraints)
```
```{r}
study_params <- fetch_study_parameters(study_accession=study_accession, param_user=param_user, param_group=param_group,
                                       project_id = project_id, conn)
print(study_params)
```

```{r}
antigen_plate <-  select_antigen_plate(
        loaded_data          = loaded_data,
        study_accession      = study_accession,
        experiment_accession = experiment_accession,
        source               = source,
        antigen              = antigen,
        plate                = plate_nom,
        antigen_constraints  = antigen_constraints
      )
```

```{r}
preprocessed_data <- preprocess_robust_curves(data = antigen_plate$plate_standard, antigen_settings = antigen_plate$antigen_settings,
                                     response_variable = response_var,
                                     independent_variable = indep_var,
                                     is_log_response = study_params$is_log_response,
                                     blank_data = antigen_plate$plate_blanks,
                                     blank_option = study_params$blank_option,
                                     is_log_independent = study_params$is_log_independent,
                                     apply_prozone = study_params$applyProzone,
                                     verbose = verbose)
preprocessed_data$data
preprocessed_data$antigen_fit_options
```

```{r}
formulas <- select_model_formulas(fixed_constraint = antigen_plate$fixed_a_result, response_variable = response_var,
                                    is_log_response = study_params$is_log_response)
print(formulas)
```

```{r}
model_constraints <- obtain_model_constraints(data = preprocessed_data$data,
                                                formulas = formulas,
                                                independent_variable = indep_var,
                                                response_variable = response_var,
                                                is_log_response = study_params$is_log_response,
                                                is_log_concentration = study_params$is_log_independent,
                                                antigen_settings = antigen_plate$antigen_settings,
                                                max_response = max(preprocessed_data$data[[response_var]], na.rm = TRUE),
                                                min_response = min(preprocessed_data$data[[response_var]], na.rm = TRUE),
                                                verbose = verbose
                                                )
model_constraints
```


```{r}
start_lists <- make_start_lists(model_constraints = model_constraints,
                                  frac_generate = 0.8,
                                  quants = c(low = 0.2, mid = 0.5, high = 0.8))
```


```{r}
fit_robust_lm <- compute_robust_curves(prepped_data = preprocessed_data$data,
                                         response_variable = response_var,
                                         independent_variable = indep_var,
                                         formulas = formulas,
                                         model_constraints = model_constraints,
                                         start_lists = start_lists,
                                         verbose = verbose)
```


```{r}
fit_summary <- summarize_model_fits(fit_robust_lm, verbose = verbose)
fit_summary
```
